title: Arcana Public Command Surface
description: Authoritative contract linking each public Arcana-shipped slash command to its skill source, invocation home, workflow owner, safety posture, and validation profile.

commands.mutation_behavior: May edit Arcana source, docs, tests, skills, and generated artifacts after reading current context.
commands.log_behavior: Updates CHANGELOG.md for user-visible Arcana changes.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/validate.py --parallel; python -m pytest; python rites/sync_docs.py --apply when generated docs change.

commands.mutation_behavior: Runs the deterministic Arcana validator suite; parallel mode may refresh transient rite artifacts.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana Markdown for ASCII directory-tree diagrams and compares each resolvable diagram to the filesystem.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana text files for UTF-8, LF, BOM, mojibake, and repair-artifact issues.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana Markdown for formatting and formula/invocation structure issues.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana pages for canonical frontmatter fields and schema values.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana references for repository-resolvable targets and enforces public-doc Markdown links plus vault/AI wikilinks.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana paths for snake_case files, kebab-case skills, and naming-policy drift.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana Markdown pages for routing reachability through valid layer-specific page links.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana paths for Windows-reserved characters and reserved basenames.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans external and hybrid Arcana pages for stable source citations.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana for credential patterns and unsafe Python or shell constructs.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana prose for hyphenated path examples where snake_case is required.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana slash-command references and this command-surface contract for drift.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans Arcana for required directories, hub files, and structural invariants.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

preconditions: Arcana is not the active target
commands.mutation_behavior: Reads the active grimoire and reports semantic naming, routing, and discoverability findings.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs unless a separate apply workflow edits files.
commands.validation_profile: Run grimoire validators after applying any accepted recommendations.

commands.mutation_behavior: Creates a new grimoire directory, scaffold files, starter chapters, git repository, and library entry.
commands.log_behavior: Creates the new grimoire log.md with the initial creation entry.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/validate_grimoire_structure.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_frontmatter.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_links.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT

commands.mutation_behavior: Creates a chapter hub, optional leaf stubs, and root or parent hub routes inside the active grimoire.
commands.log_behavior: Appends one create entry to the active grimoire log.md.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/validate_grimoire_structure.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_frontmatter.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT

commands.mutation_behavior: Creates or updates a wiki page and routes it through an active-grimoire hub.
commands.log_behavior: Appends one file-answer entry to the active grimoire log.md.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/validate_frontmatter.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_links.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT

commands.mutation_behavior: Reads the generated Arcana skill catalog and the active grimoire's own skill frontmatter; presents the /grm-* family and the grimoire's own skills.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/sync_docs.py --apply when Arcana skill frontmatter or command-surface metadata changes.

commands.mutation_behavior: Audits and may edit active-grimoire scaffold files, hubs, links, routing, and chapter organization.
commands.log_behavior: Appends active-grimoire log entries for applied improvements when files change.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/validate.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT before and after edits; run /grm-validate-boundaries as the judgment boundary pass.

preconditions: Source file, source folder, or inbox sweep
commands.mutation_behavior: Moves or copies classified inputs into sources or chapters, then updates derived pages and hubs.
commands.log_behavior: Appends one ingest entry to the active grimoire log.md per operation.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/validate_frontmatter.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_provenance.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_links.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT

commands.mutation_behavior: Runs mechanical validators and judgment passes; applies only approved fixes.
commands.log_behavior: Appends one lint entry to the active grimoire log.md when fixes are applied.

preconditions: Supported agent target or all supported targets
commands.mutation_behavior: Plans and writes Arcana-shipped skills and active-grimoire skills into supported agent skill directories; generated SKILL.md files carry Arcana ownership metadata, generated provenance can prove ownership, unowned collisions block apply, stale cleanup touches only owned generated skills, and --reset-managed replaces current managed namespace directories before re-registering.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/register_skills.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT --dry-run; temp-target tests for dry-run, repeated apply, generated-provenance update, owned cleanup, unowned preservation, managed-namespace reset, and prefix collisions.

commands.mutation_behavior: Dry-run reports filename-only wikilink repairs; --apply rewrites unambiguous wikilinks in active-grimoire Markdown files.
commands.log_behavior: Records repair details in active-grimoire log.md through the invocation workflow after apply.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/repair_links.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_links.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT; python rites/validate_orphans.py --grimoire GRIMOIRE_ROOT

commands.mutation_behavior: Follows the RESTORATION.md procedure: may pull Arcana with git --ff-only, reconcile the library, reset and re-register skills, refresh marked agent blocks, and bring the active grimoire current.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Follows the RESTORATION.md procedure: may pull Arcana with git --ff-only, reconcile the library, reset and re-register skills, refresh marked agent blocks, and bring any active grimoire current.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Runs the deterministic grimoire validator profile; parallel mode may refresh transient rite artifacts.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Uses deterministic search aids and judgment to report boundary violations in the active grimoire.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.
commands.validation_profile: Run as a judgment pass; confirm fixes with /grm-validate-structure and /grm-validate-links when files change.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans active-grimoire Markdown for ASCII directory-tree diagrams and compares each resolvable diagram to the filesystem.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans active-grimoire text files for UTF-8, LF, BOM, mojibake, and repair-artifact issues.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans active-grimoire Markdown for tables, code fences, and tree examples.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans active-grimoire pages for canonical frontmatter fields and schema values.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans active-grimoire references for repository-resolvable targets and enforces public-doc Markdown links plus vault/AI wikilinks.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans active-grimoire pages for routing reachability through valid layer-specific page links.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans active-grimoire paths for Windows-reserved characters and reserved basenames.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans active-grimoire external and hybrid pages for stable source citations.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Scans active-grimoire required structure and managed scaffold files against the scaffold contract.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.

preconditions: Supported agent target or all supported targets
commands.mutation_behavior: Plans and writes Arcana-shipped skills and installed grimoire skills into supported agent skill directories; generated SKILL.md files carry Arcana ownership metadata, generated provenance can prove ownership, unowned collisions block apply, stale cleanup touches only owned generated skills, and --reset-managed replaces current managed namespace directories before re-registering.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/register_skills.py --dry-run; temp-target tests for dry-run, repeated apply, generated-provenance update, owned cleanup, unowned preservation, managed-namespace reset, and prefix collisions.

commands.mutation_behavior: Replaces or inserts only the marked Grimoire instruction block in user agent instruction files.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.
commands.validation_profile: Re-read touched files and confirm exactly one canonical Grimoire block per file.

preconditions: Unmanaged directory under the grimoire home
commands.mutation_behavior: Writes a new grimoire.json manifest and refuses to overwrite an existing manifest.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/adopt_grimoire.py TARGET --skill-prefix PREFIX --description DESC; python rites/sync_library.py --apply

commands.mutation_behavior: Dry-run reports local library drift; --apply reconciles library.json entries.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire logs.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/sync_library.py; python rites/sync_library.py --apply when approved.

commands.mutation_behavior: Deletes known temporary rite artifacts; dry-run previews removals.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.

commands.mutation_behavior: Reads generated Arcana skill catalog and locally registered grimoire skill frontmatter.
commands.log_behavior: Does not append grimoire or Arcana logs.
commands.validation_profile: python rites/sync_docs.py --apply when Arcana skill frontmatter or command-surface metadata changes.
